title: Changed: Xtras
description: Adds quite a bit of weapons
body:
(Made With Mcreator)
This Mod Was Made To Make It Easier To Survive In The Changed Environment.

Join The Discord Server If You Have Questions!

 

EVERYTHING BELOW IS OLD INFORMATION

Ores

Aluminum Ore:
Found From Y 60 - Y 320.
Drops 1 Raw Aluminum Each Block
Fortune Does Not Apply
Must Be Mined With A Stone Pickaxe And Better.

Opal Ore:
From Y -20 - Y -70.
Drops 1 Opal Each Block.
Fortune Does Not Apply
Must Be Mined With A Diamond Pickaxe And Better.

Weaponry

Steelite:
An Alternative Version Of Painite From The Addon.
Recipe?
4 Steel Ingots, 4 Netherite Ingots, 1 Nether Star.
Yes It Is Expensive, But It Does Have A Reason...

Advanced TSC Weaponry

The Advanced TSC Baton:
A Decent Weapon, Its Shock Is Much Stronger, And Its Attack Is A Tiny Bit Stronger.

The Officer's TSC Baton:
Better Than Netherite Already! Shocks, And Does 9 Attack Damage!

Police Weaponry

Police Baton (And Upgraded):
Very Good Starting Weapon.
Weakens Enemys, And Is Just A Good Weapon

Steel Weapons

Steel Sword:
A Decent Sword That Has A 5% Chance
To Do An Additional 8 Damage.

Mutated Latex Bottles

Mutated Latex: X-978
Boosts All Swimming Capabilitys.
Recipe: (In A Refinery)
Latex: X-978, Diamond, Water Bucket, Latex Sap.

Mutated Latex: X-007
Boost All Land Movement.
Made By Having Latex: F-007 And Getting Shocked By Lightning.

Mutated Latex: X-778
Boosts Mining Speed.
Made By Having Latex: X-778 And Getting 1 Exp Level

Refinery Recipes

The Refinery Does Not Have A Gui... And Thats Going To Make It Hard To Use It, Welcome To The Refinery Recipes Section Of The Description.

Latex Bottles

Latex: X-008
Refined Into: Latex: X-331, Latex: X-978.

Latex: X-331
Bacteria, 50% Chance For Latex: F-007. Other 50% For Water.

Latex: F-007
Latex: X-157, Latex: F-778.

Latex: F-778
Bacteria, Latex: X-778.

Enjoy

 

I Hope You Enjoy The Pain Of Getting Some Of This Stuff
